diagnostic_explanation: Both reviewers kept the claim unsupported and used no citations, so there is no real citation difference. The main variation is in how they coded the deficiency: option 1 uses the broader insufficiency framing, while option 2 uses a more claim-focused code stating that the central proposition is unsupported. These are compatible rather than contradictory. The rationales are also aligned: both say the record does not establish a launch behind a feature flag, and option 2 adds a brief interpretive note that evidence 1 points the other way because the flag was skipped. Since confidence is identical and high, there is no confidence difference.
